mapper.select: select organization_table.organization_Id, organization_table.organization_Name, organization_table.organization_Desc, organization_table.organization_Owner, organization_table.organization_Addr, organization_table.organization_Type from organization_table where organization_table.organization_Id in (#{organization_Id})
SELECT newsdetail_table.id, newsdetail_table.newTitle, newsdetail_table.publishTime FROM newsdetail_table ORDER BY newsdetail_table.id DESC

SELECT newsdetail_table.id, newsdetail_table.newTitle, newsdetail_table.author, newsdetail_table.publishTime, newsdetail_table.readCount, newsdetail_table.source, newsdetail_table.coverImage, newsdetail_table.contentParagraphs, newsdetail_table.contentImages FROM newsdetail_table WHERE newsdetail_table.id =#{newId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feedback_table ( feedback_table.title, feedback_table.contactName, feedback_table.contactPhone, feedback_table.contactWechat, feedback_table.feedbackType, feedback_table.feedbackTypeText, feedback_table.selectedCategory, feedback_table.selectedCategoryText, feedback_table.description, feedback_table.targetDetail, feedback_table.imagesCount, feedback_table.imagesUrlList, feedback_table.isAnonymous, feedback_table.submitTime ) VALUES (#{title},#{contactName},#{contactPhone},#{contactWechat},#{feedbackType},#{feedbackTypeText},#{selectedCategory},#{selectedCategoryText},#{description},#{targetDetail},#{imagesCount},#{imagesUrlList},#{isAnonymous},#{submitTime})
